scenario: P5X59 GUI refresh existing successful Fal image task into canvas:design and project export

steps: Open File Manager from the home input bar.
Verify preview uses design-canvas-inline-preview and does not mount full design-canvas.
Verify the existing Fal task output is written back into the hero image layer.
Open the latest saved project from the full editor.

consoleErrors.classification: DevBridge event stream noise; non-blocking for canvas refresh/export/readback

refresh.successMessage: 已刷新 1 个图片任务，并写回 1 个图层结果。

export.successMessage: 已保存图层设计工程：.lime/layered-designs/p5x59-gui-refresh-existing-task-20260509.layered-design（7 个文件，1 个 assets）。

readback.successMessage: 已打开图层设计工程：.lime/layered-designs/p5x59-gui-refresh-existing-task-20260509.layered-design（7 个文件，1 个 assets）。

knownGap.summary: The project export kept the generated hero image as a remote reference because the Fal CDN URL did not finish downloading within the native best-effort cache window in this environment.

evidence.curlProbe: 90s probe downloaded 396227 of 1223993 bytes before timeout.

knownGap.impact: The saved project remains editable and can be read back while online, but it is not yet a fully offline-portable engineering directory for the generated Fal hero layer.
knownGap.nextAction: Add observable remote-asset cache status and a non-blocking retry/cache action for current canvas:design project export rather than hiding the gap behind a success message.
